step_rationale: Apolipoprotein; lipid-metabolism regulator; decreased in incident AMI.
mechanism: APOC4 regulates lipoprotein metabolism and lipid composition; decreased levels may reflect altered lipid handling during acute MI.

references.title: A Mass Spectrometry-Based Proteome Study of Twin Pairs Discordant for Incident Acute Myocardial Infarction within Three Years after Blood Sampling Suggests Novel Biomarkers.
